mapper.sql: es.exam_id, es.user_id, es.subject_id, s.subject_code, s.subject_name, es.level_code, es.status, es.result_status, es.total_problem_count, es.correct_count, es.retry_count, es.started_at, es.submitted_at, es.graded_at, es.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM exam_sessions es JOIN subjects s ON s.subject_id = es.subject_id WHERE es.user_id = #{userId} AND es.status = 'GRADED' ORDER BY es.graded_at DESC, es.exam_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ea.answer_id, p.exam_id, p.ai_problem_id, p.problem_no, p.prompt, COALESCE(ea.passed_case_count, 0) AS passed_case_count, COALESCE(ea.is_correct, 0) AS is_correct, ea.ai_review, ea.test_case_result, ea.submitted_at, ea.graded_at FROM ai_exam_problems p LEFT JOIN exam_answers ea ON ea.ai_problem_id = p.ai_problem_id WHERE p.exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY p.problem_no ASC

SELECT cn.node_id, cn.title AS node_title, cn.node_type, cn.planet_no, COALESCE(lp.lesson_completed, 0) AS lesson_completed, COALESCE(lp.practice_passed, 0) AS practice_passed, COALESCE(lp.progress_rate, 0.00) AS progress_rate, lp.completed_at FROM curriculum_nodes cn LEFT JOIN learning_progress lp ON lp.node_id = cn.node_id AND lp.user_id = #{userId} AND lp.subject_id = #{subjectId} WHERE cn.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND cn.is_active = 1 ORDER BY cn.level_code ASC, cn.sort_order ASC, cn.node_id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_attempts, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN passed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS passed_attempts, COALESCE(SUM(total_count), 0) AS total_problems, COALESCE(SUM(correct_count), 0) AS correct_problems, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(correct_count) / NULLIF(SUM(total_count), 0) * 100, 2), 0.00) AS average_correct_rate FROM practice_set_attempts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'

SELECT COUNT(wa.wrong_answer_id) AS total_wrong_answers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN wa.review_status = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS open_wrong_answers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN wa.review_status = 'SOLVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solved_wrong_answers, COALESCE(SUM(wa.wrong_count), 0) AS total_wrong_count FROM wrong_answers wa JOIN practice_set_attempts psa ON psa.set_attempt_id = wa.set_attempt_id WHERE wa.user_id = #{userId} AND psa.subject_id = #{subjectId}

SELECT cn.node_id, cn.title AS node_title, COUNT(wa.wrong_answer_id) AS wrong_answer_count, COALESCE(SUM(wa.wrong_count), 0) AS total_wrong_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN wa.review_status = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS open_count FROM wrong_answers wa JOIN practice_problems pp ON pp.problem_id = wa.problem_id JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = pp.node_id JOIN practice_set_attempts psa ON psa.set_attempt_id = wa.set_attempt_id WHERE wa.user_id = #{userId} AND psa.subject_id = #{subjectId} GROUP BY cn.node_id, cn.title ORDER BY total_wrong_count DESC, wrong_answer_count DESC, cn.node_id ASC
